HR36.reason: Pain-Capable Unborn Child Protection Act - directly bans abortions after 20 weeks based on claim that fetuses can feel pain at that gestational age, with criminal penalties for providers

HR3504.reason: Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act (114th) - targets late-term abortions by requiring medical care for infants born after attempted abortions, primarily relevant to later gestational ages

S6.reason: Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act (119th) - targets late-term abortion practices by requiring medical care for infants born alive after abortion attempts

HR8296.reason: Women's Health Protection Act of 2022 - protects abortion access throughout pregnancy by prohibiting state-level bans, including those after 20 weeks

HR8297.reason: Ensuring Access to Abortion Act of 2022 - protects ability to travel for abortions including late-term procedures banned in home states

S4132.reason: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate, 117th) - would prohibit state bans on abortion including those after 20 weeks

HR3755.reason: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate cloture, 117th) - would protect abortion access including after 20 weeks by prohibiting state restrictions
